title: Senior Software Engineer - Capital Float Ventures Solutions - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Capital Float Ventures Solutions - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Capital Float Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Capital Float Ventures Solutions:
Capital Float Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float Ventures Solutions!
